items.title: Field Maps
items.summary: Regional map bundles staged through RoachNet manifests so the app can install verified packs without depending on live upstream links.

items.title: Knowledge Shelf
items.summary: Wikipedia, medical references, and field manuals mirrored behind roachnet.org URLs with resumable pulls and integrity checks.

items.title: RoachClaw Model Packs
items.summary: Machine-aware local models recommended from the user’s specs, with contained installs and a cloud lane fallback for first boot.

items.title: Field Ops Toolkit
items.summary: A future catalog lane for offline-friendly dev and field tools that should install from RoachNet’s mirror instead of scattered upstream download pages.
